title: 我认为...
prompt_en: Practice I think that I believe that I know that clauses.
prompt_zh: 练习I think/believe/know+(that)宾语从句表达想法。
description: 掌握that宾语从句的肯定和否定形式。
knowledge_points: 宾语从句 我认为 I think I believe I know
teaching_markdown:
## that 宾语从句
宾语从句 = 一个完整句子作为动词的宾语。

## 肯定形式
- I think (that) you are right.
- I believe (that) he is telling the truth.
- I know (that) you are busy.

## 否定转移
- I don't think (that) it's a good idea.
- 注意：否定转移到主句，不是从句

## that 在口语中可省略
- I think you are right. = I think that you are right.

title: 我知道/听说
prompt_en: Practice I know that I'm sure that I'm sorry that.
prompt_zh: 练习I know/I'm sure/I'm sorry+(that)从句。
description: 掌握表达确定和感受的宾语从句。
knowledge_points: 我知道 I know I'm sure I'm sorry that
teaching_markdown:
## 我知道/确定
- I know (that) you are busy.
- I'm sure (that) everything will be fine.
- I'm sure (that) he will come.

## 抱歉
- I'm sorry (that) I'm late.
- I'm sorry (that) I forgot.
- I'm sorry (that) I missed the call.

## 例句
- I'm sure we can finish on time.
- I know she works very hard.

title: 不确定
prompt_en: Practice I'm not sure and I don't know wh- clauses.
prompt_zh: 练习I'm not sure/I don't know+wh-不确定表达。
description: 掌握不确定表达和疑问词从句。
knowledge_points: 不确定 not sure don't know what where why
teaching_markdown:
## 不确定表达
- I'm not sure (that) I can go.
- I'm not sure (that) it will work.

## wh- 宾语从句
- I don't know what he wants.
- Can you tell me where the station is?
- I wonder why he is late.

## 例句
- I don't know what to do.
- Can you tell me where the bathroom is?
- I wonder why she left.

title: 转述他人
prompt_en: Practice reported speech He said that She told me that.
prompt_zh: 练习转述表达：He said/She told me/I heard+(that)从句。
description: 掌握转述他人话语的动词+that从句。
knowledge_points: 转述 said told me heard that
teaching_markdown:
## 转述动词
- He said (that) he would come.
- She told me (that) she liked it.
- I heard (that) the store is closing.

## 时态变化
- 转述时动词时态有时需要后移
- He said: "I am busy." → He said (that) he was busy.
- 但陈述普遍事实时可不变时态

## 例句
- She told me she needed help.
- I heard he got married.

title: 疑问词从句
prompt_en: Practice wh- clauses what where when why how.
prompt_zh: 练习what/where/when/why/how引导的宾语从句。
description: 掌握疑问词引导的宾语从句。
knowledge_points: 疑问词从句 what where when why how
teaching_markdown:
## wh- 宾语从句
- I don't know what he wants.
- Can you tell me where the station is?
- I wonder why he is late.
- I understand how you feel.

## 语序注意
- 宾语从句用陈述句语序，不是疑问句语序
- ✅ I know where he lives.
- ❌ I know where does he live.

## 例句
- Do you know when the meeting starts?
- I don't understand why she said that.

title: 描述物品
prompt_en: Practice relative clauses with that for objects.
prompt_zh: 练习用that引导定语从句描述物品。
description: 掌握that指物的定语从句。
knowledge_points: 定语从句 that 指物 描述物品
teaching_markdown:
## 定语从句（that指物）
- The book that I read is very interesting.
- Is this the food that you like?
- I like the one that you showed me.

## that 在从句中作宾语时可省略
- The book I read is good. = The book that I read is good.

## 例句
- The movie that we watched was great.
- I like the phone that you recommended.

title: 描述人
prompt_en: Practice relative clauses with who for people.
prompt_zh: 练习用who引导定语从句描述人。
description: 掌握who指人的定语从句。
knowledge_points: 定语从句 who 指人 描述人
teaching_markdown:
## 定语从句（who指人）
- The person who called is my boss.
- Do you know the girl who is talking to Tom?
- He is the kind of person who never gives up.

## who vs that
- who 专指人（更精确）
- that 也可指人（口语通用）

## 例句
- The friend who helped me is very kind.
- I know the woman who works there.

title: 地点与原因
prompt_en: Practice relative clauses with where and why.
prompt_zh: 练习where和why引导的定语从句。
description: 掌握where和why定语从句。
knowledge_points: 定语从句 where why 地点 原因
teaching_markdown:
## 地点从句（where）
- The restaurant where we met is still there.
- That's the place where I grew up.

## 原因从句（why）
- This is the reason why I came.
- That's why I called.

## 例句
- The park where we walked is beautiful.
- The company where I work is far away.
- Tell me the reason why you said no.

title: 偏好描述
prompt_en: Practice describing preferences with relative clauses.
prompt_zh: 练习用定语从句表达偏好（最喜欢的…）。
description: 掌握定语从句综合表达偏好。
knowledge_points: 偏好 描述 the one that I like most
teaching_markdown:
## 偏好描述
- The movie that I like most is...
- The book that I like most is...
- The color that I like best is blue.

## 例句
- The food that I like most is pizza.
- The song that I enjoy most is this one.

title: 综合描述
prompt_en: Practice complex descriptions combining multiple relative clauses.
prompt_zh: 练习多个定语从句综合描述。
description: 掌握定语从句的综合运用。
knowledge_points: 综合描述 someone that who there are many
teaching_markdown:
## 综合描述
- The friend who helped me is someone that I can always trust.
- There are many things that I want to learn.

## 例句
- There are many places that I want to visit.
- She is the kind of person who always helps others.
- He is someone that everyone respects.

title: 想要/希望
prompt_en: Practice want to hope to would like to for intentions.
prompt_zh: 练习用不定式表达想要/希望/意愿。
description: 掌握want/hope/would like+to do。
knowledge_points: 不定式 想要 want to hope to would like to
teaching_markdown:
## 不定式表示意图
- I want to learn Spanish.
- I hope to see you again soon.
- I would like to apply for this job.

## 接不定式的动词
- want / hope / wish / expect / plan / intend
- 这些动词后只能接 to do

## 例句
- I want to travel abroad.
- I hope to hear from you soon.
- I would like to speak to the manager.

title: 决定/承诺
prompt_en: Practice decided to promised to and forget to.
prompt_zh: 练习用不定式表达决定、承诺和提醒。
description: 掌握decide/promise/forget+to do。
knowledge_points: 不定式 决定 decided to promised to don''t forget
teaching_markdown:
## 决定
- I decided to study abroad.
- She chose to stay at home.

## 承诺
- I promised to help him.

## 提醒
- Don't forget to call me.

## 例句
- I decided to change my job.
- He promised to be on time.
- Don't forget to lock the door.

title: 为了...目的
prompt_en: Practice infinitive of purpose to express reasons for actions.
prompt_zh: 练习用不定式表达做某事的目的。
description: 掌握不定式作目的状语的用法。
knowledge_points: 不定式 目的 to do in order to
teaching_markdown:
## 不定式表示目的
- I came here to study English.
- I went to the store to buy some food.
- I saved money to buy a car.

## 结构
- 主语 + 动词 + 目的: to + 动词原形

## 例句
- I went to the bank to cash a check.
- I called to check the time.
- I went to the gym to work out.

title: 评价：做...是...的
prompt_en: Practice It is + adjective + to do structure.
prompt_zh: 练习It is + 形容词 + to do 表达评价。
description: 掌握It's+adj+to do评价句型。
knowledge_points: 不定式 评价 It is important to It is fun to
teaching_markdown:
## It's + 形容词 + to do
- It's important to practice every day.
- It's fun to travel with friends.
- It's hard to say goodbye.

## 常见形容词
- important / necessary / possible / impossible
- fun / hard / difficult / easy / safe / dangerous

## 例句
- It's nice to meet you.
- It's good to see you again.
- It's easy to learn with practice.

title: 有事要做
prompt_en: Practice have something to do structure.
prompt_zh: 练习have+名词+to do表示"有事要做"。
description: 掌握不定式作定语的用法。
knowledge_points: 不定式 定语 have something to do
teaching_markdown:
## 不定式作定语
- I have something to tell you.
- I have something to show you.
- I have a lot to learn.

## 结构
- have + 名词 + to do

## 例句
- Do you have anything to eat?
- I have nothing to say.
- She has a lot of work to do.
- Give me something to drink.

title: 我喜欢做...
prompt_en: Practice enjoy like love hate + gerund for activities.
prompt_zh: 练习enjoy/like/love/hate+doing表达喜好活动。
description: 掌握动名词作宾语的用法。
knowledge_points: 动名词 enjoy like love hate doing
teaching_markdown:
## 动名词作宾语
- I enjoy reading books in my free time.
- I like swimming but I don't like running.
- I love watching movies on weekends.
- I hate waiting in long lines.

## 只接动名词的动词
- enjoy / mind / avoid / practice / suggest / finish / keep

## like/love/hate可接to do或doing
- I like swimming. = I like to swim.
- 意思基本相同

title: 开始/结束/继续
prompt_en: Practice start finish keep + gerund for action phases.
prompt_zh: 练习start/finish/keep+doing表达开始结束继续。
description: 掌握表示动作阶段的动名词句型。
knowledge_points: 动名词 start finish keep doing
teaching_markdown:
## 开始/结束/继续
- I started learning English two years ago.
- I finished writing the report.
- I keep trying even when it's hard.

## 常用动词
- start / begin / finish / stop / continue / keep

## 例句
- I started learning to drive last month.
- She finished cleaning the room.
- Keep practicing and you'll improve.

title: 擅长/对...感兴趣
prompt_en: Practice be good at be interested in + gerund.
prompt_zh: 练习be good at/be interested in+doing表达擅长和兴趣。
description: 掌握介词+动名词的用法。
knowledge_points: 动名词 擅长 good at interested in tired of
teaching_markdown:
## 介词+动名词
- I'm good at remembering names.
- She is interested in learning new things.
- He is tired of waiting.

## 常用搭配
- be good at / be bad at
- be interested in / be fond of
- be tired of / be afraid of
- be excited about / be worried about

## 例句
- I'm good at solving problems.
- She is interested in art and music.
- He is tired of working too much.

title: 做...很有趣
prompt_en: Practice gerund as subject Swimming is fun.
prompt_zh: 练习动名词作主语表达活动的性质。
description: 掌握动名词作主语的用法。
knowledge_points: 动名词主语 Swimming is fun Learning is good
teaching_markdown:
## 动名词作主语
- Swimming is a lot of fun.
- Learning a new language is good for your brain.

## 常见句型
- ___ is a lot of fun.（…很有趣）
- ___ is good for ___.（…对…有好处）
- ___ takes time.（…需要时间）

## 例句
- Running is good for your health.
- Traveling broadens the mind.
- Reading is good for your mind.

title: 感谢/道歉
prompt_en: Practice Thank you for I'm sorry for + gerund.
prompt_zh: 练习Thank you for/I'm sorry for+doing表达感谢和道歉。
description: 掌握感谢和道歉的动名词表达。
knowledge_points: 动名词 感谢 thank you for sorry for
teaching_markdown:
## 感谢和道歉
- Thank you for helping me.
- I'm sorry for being late.

## 结构
- Thank you for + 动名词
- I'm sorry for + 动名词

## 例句
- Thank you for coming.
- Thank you for waiting.
- I'm sorry for not calling.
- I'm sorry for disturbing you.
- Thank you for your time.
- I'm sorry for making you wait.

title: 混合从句与不定式
prompt_en: Practice combining object clauses with infinitives.
prompt_zh: 练习宾语从句和不定式的混合表达。
description: 掌握从句+不定式的综合表达。
knowledge_points: 混合 从句 不定式 think it important to
teaching_markdown:
## 从句+不定式
- I think it's important to practice every day.
- I know that he wants to be a doctor.

## 从句+动名词
- I believe that learning English is fun.
- She said that she enjoys working here.

## 定语从句+不定式
- The best thing that you can do is to keep trying.

## 例句
- I think it's necessary to save money.
- I know that she wants to travel the world.

title: 混合不定式与动名词
prompt_en: Practice mixing infinitives and gerunds in complex sentences.
prompt_zh: 练习不定式和动名词的混合表达。
description: 掌握不定式和动名词的综合运用。
knowledge_points: 混合 不定式 动名词 enjoy traveling is the best
teaching_markdown:
## 混合表达
- The best thing that you can do is to keep trying.
- I enjoy traveling because I think it's the best way to learn.

## 结构
- 从句 + 不定式
- 从句 + 动名词
- 定语从句 + 不定式

## 例句
- The most important thing is to never give up.
- I like reading because it helps me relax.
ink_script_key: practice_foundation-clause-gerund_综合运用_混合不定式动名词

title: 叙事：我的一段经历
prompt_en: Practice telling stories using clauses infinitives and gerunds.
prompt_zh: 练习用从句、不定式和动名词讲述经历。
description: 掌握综合运用叙述经历。
knowledge_points: 叙事 经历 混合表达
teaching_markdown:
## 用混合结构叙事
- I decided to learn English because I think it's important for my future.
- The friend who encouraged me the most is someone that I will always remember.

## 技巧
- 用定语从句描述人和事物
- 用不定式表达目的和意图
- 用宾语从句表达想法和感受

## 例句
- I decided to start running because I think it's healthy.
- The teacher who inspired me is someone that I respect deeply.

title: 观点：我为什么觉得...
prompt_en: Practice expressing opinions with complex structures.
prompt_zh: 练习用复杂结构表达观点和理由。
description: 掌握用复杂结构表达观点的能力。
knowledge_points: 观点 复杂表达 I think because"
teaching_markdown:
## 观点表达
- I think the movie that we watched is worth seeing.
- What I like most about this city is the people.

## 推荐理由
- I recommend this book because it's interesting and easy to read.
- I think you should try this restaurant because the food is amazing.

## 例句
- I believe that traveling is the best way to learn.
- What I enjoy most about my job is meeting new people.

title: 长篇描述：我最喜欢的...
prompt_en: Practice long descriptions using all learned structures.
prompt_zh: 练习综合运用从句、不定式和动名词进行长篇描述。
description: 掌握综合运用所有结构的表达能力。
knowledge_points: 长篇描述 我最喜欢的 混合 综合
teaching_markdown:
## 长篇描述结构
1. 先用定语从句引出主题
2. 用宾语从句表达观点
3. 用不定式说明原因
4. 用动名词表达感受

## 例句
- The thing that I like most is reading because I think it's a great way to relax.
- I enjoy traveling because I believe it's the best way to learn about different cultures.
- The friend who helped me the most is someone that I will never forget.
